description: One row per actively-pursued opportunity. Stores all prep materials and links to the dedicated Claude Project for that role.

properties.name: Claude Project URL
properties.notes: Link to the dedicated Claude Project for this opportunity. Add manually after creating the project.

properties.name: Job Tracker URL
properties.notes: Link back to the Job Tracker row for this role

properties.name: Resume Used
properties.notes: Name of the resume variant Claude selected and optimized

properties.name: Cheat Sheet
properties.notes: Generated by Claude: STAR stories, talking points, questions to ask, comp notes

properties.name: Company Research
properties.notes: Generated by Claude: business overview, recent news, engineering culture, role context

properties.name: Key Talking Points
properties.notes: Top 3-5 things to emphasize for this specific role

properties.name: Questions To Ask
properties.notes: 5 smart, company-specific questions generated by Claude

properties.name: Mock Interview Notes
properties.notes: Notes from Claude-run mock interview sessions

properties.name: Post Interview Notes
properties.notes: Your debrief after each real interview round

properties.name: AI Coaching Notes
properties.notes: Claude's feedback on mock interview performance and areas to strengthen
